GitOntologyLoadingService.name: Remote GIT Repository
GitOntologyLoadingService.description: Load an ontology from a remote git repository

importForm.description: Specify the remote repository to clone

fields.repositoryUrl.title: Repository URL
fields.repositoryUrl.description: e.g. https://github.com/lukaskabc/ontopus.git (cloning with SSH is not supported)
fields.branch.title: Branch or Tag
fields.branch.description: (optional) Enter the exact branch or tag to clone or leave empty to clone the default branch
fields.username.title: Username
fields.password.title: Password
fields.authText.title: Authentication

github.label: GitHub Webhook
github.title: GitHub Webhook
github.items.title: Configuration
github.description: Configure a GitHub webhook trigger for repeating the last ontology publishing process.

secret.title: Secret
secret.description: The secret configured in the GitHub webhook must match this value for the request to be accepted

event.title: Event type
event.description: The type of the event to match

ref.title: Reference pattern
ref.description: Regex pattern to match the git reference (e.g. `refs\\/heads\\/main)`

refType.title: Ref type
refType.description: The type of the git ref to match
